title: Classic Algerian Chicken Tagine
description: A hearty and flavorful tagine recipe made with juicy chicken, malty spices, and fresh tomatoes.
instructions: Heat oil in a large clay or ceramic tagine over medium heat.
Add the malty spices and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add the chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the algerian spices, juicy parsley, and diced tomato.
Cover the tagine and transfer it to the oven.
Bake at 300°F (150°C) for 30-40 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
